config_summary:
conf = Config(
    Paths(logFile='build/test/baselines-work-phase1/ex_diffusion.log',
          outputDir='build/test/baselines-work-phase1/ex_diffusion'),
    General(convectionScheme='firstOrderUpwind',
            nThreads=2),
    InitialCondition(Tfuel=600,
                     Toxidizer=600,
                     centerWidth=0.002,
                     flameType='diffusion',
                     fuel='CH4:1.0, N2:2.0',
                     slopeWidth=0.001,
                     xLeft=-0.004,
                     xRight=0.004),
    StrainParameters(final=100,
                     initial=100),
    Times(globalTimestep=1e-05,
          profileStepInterval=20),
    TerminationCondition(tEnd=0.01))
deviations_from_stock: Paths.outputDir/logFile redirected into scratch --outdir (no effect on physics)
General.convectionScheme overridden to 'firstOrderUpwind' via --scheme (harness extension for Task 1.5; no other physics changes)

scalar_notes.consumption_speed: Not physically meaningful for this configuration: the domain boundary temperatures are nearly equal (T[0]=600.00 K, T[-1]=600.00 K), so the premixed consumption-speed formula Q/cp integral / (rho_u*(Tb-Tu)) has a near-zero denominator. Raw solver value (inf) discarded and replaced with null.
